docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2011 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YUEN, KEVIN DBA BRANNAN AUTO EXPERT
JUDGMENT DEBTORS REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS; FILED BY DEFENDANT ZOU, DAVISSON DBA D.W. GRAPHICS & DESIGN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZOU, DAVISSON DBA D.W. GRAPHICS & DESIGN
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $118.90 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ZOU, DAVISSON DBA D.W. GRAPHICS & DESIGN

ORDER (SC-222) AS TO JUDGMENT DEBTORS REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-221)-REQUEST IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS ORDERED TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF $300.00 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR ON THE 20TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING JUN-20-2011 UNTIL JUN-20-2013 WHEN THE FINAL PAYMENT OF $130.00 IS DUE. THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF PAYMENTS IS $7630.00 WHICH INCLUDES INTEREST ON THE UNPAID BALANCE OF THE JUDGMENT. THE ACTUAL AMOUNT OF THAT INTEREST MAY CHANGE IF PAYMENTS ARE MADE LATE OR EARLY.
